metadata.description: A collection of skills and plugins loosely related to building projects.

plugins.name: git-history-rewrite
plugins.description: Safety net for destructive git operations — `git filter-repo`, `git push --force`, and `git reset --hard`.

plugins.name: share-artifact
plugins.description: Share a finished image or GIF with the user as a viewable, signed URL — uploads it to Cloudinary and pastes back a link that works on mobile, chat, or any remote control where local file paths are useless. Scoped to images and GIFs; does not produce or edit artifacts.
